title: Awesome large upper of duplex with huge windows, and unique features..
description: Imagine living 1 mile from the Northern entrance to the Microsoft campus, AND about 1 mile from the western entrance to Marymoore park in a large (1400 square feet) 2 bedroom 2 bath... Imagine having room to park 4 cars in the driveway. Imagine it being set back far enough to almost not be able to hear the traffic on Bel-Red road. Imagine the warmth of the hydronic heating system in the winter, while you sit in front of the fireplace in a gigantic living room with amazing lighting. Imagine wide overhangs on the roof so you can sit in the shade, and look out over the yard at the beautiful blooming lilac bush. Imagine having a full storage locker worth of storage AT the house so you don't have to rent an extra one. Imagine having double view windows in the living room - (side note: damn that tree that grew up and blocked the territorial view!  but you still get a nice view into a woody vista), and another pair of view windows off the kitchen. Imagine a 24" deep tub that gets 18" of water to soak in, while you stare up at a tile mosiac of the night sky where the stars are done in real gold. Imagine all this for only $2900 per month? Imagine that this house is a duplex, and whats for rent is the upper floor. Call John to come take a look so that you can turn all those imaginings into reality. show contact info

title: Beautiful Luxury ADU on Quiet 10-Acre Estate: Work-Trade Opportunities
description: Available SEPTEMBER 1st!! Beautiful Luxury ADU on Quiet 10-Acre Estate: Work-Trade Opportunities Value: $2,250/month (All Utilities + High-Speed Internet Included) Location: Redmond, WA Occupancy: Perfect for 1 person (Ideal for remote professionals, retirees, or students) Escape to a peaceful, pristine 10-acre private equestrian property! We are looking for a reliable, animal-loving individual to move into our gorgeous, nearly new 450-sq-ft luxury ADU. Whether you are an experienced equestrian looking to trade chores for a rent discount, or simply an animal lover who would enjoy hanging out with our friendly dogs and cats while we travel, we have an option that fits! We are looking for someone who genuinely loves animals and would find joy in spending time with them. We offer two pathways depending on your background: Option 1: The Equestrian Work-Trade (Rent Reduction) If you have horse experience, you can trade 1–2 days per week of routine stall cleaning and animal chores (8-stall barn, 3 friendly goats, and 6 chickens) for a fixed monthly rent discount. Growth Potential: If it’s a great fit after the first 30 days, we are open to increasing your scheduled days for a further rent reduction. Travel Bonuses: Earn extra rent credits by filling in for PM feedings and afternoon turn-ins when we travel. Option 2: The Pet-Lover’s Retreat (Travel-Based Discounts) No horse experience? No problem! If you simply love house pets and want a beautiful place to live, this option is for you. You won't handle any horses or heavy barn chores. Instead, you'll pay standard rent, but receive generous rent credits whenever we travel by stepping in to care for our household pets. It’s a pretty chill, straightforward routine—feeding, playing with, and loving on our dogs, and cat. The Housing The ADU is a high-end, light-filled junior one-bedroom located above a detached garage, offering complete privacy and stunning pastoral views. Premium Features: Modern kitchen with granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, in-unit washer/dryer, air conditioning, and a private deck overlooking the pastures. Perks: Designated parking space, extra storage space in the garage, and all utilities included (water, garbage, electricity, and high-speed internet). Details: Strictly no smoking/vaping/drugs. About You (The Ideal Neighbor) You are a self-starter who values a clean, peaceful living environment and communicates openly. You genuinely love animals and find their company rewarding. For Option 1: You are comfortable and experienced handling horses and physically able to lift 50 lbs. (Bonus points if you have basic handy skills or tractor experience!) For Option 2: You just need a deep love for dogs and cats and a reliable, responsible nature. Bring Your Horse! (Optional) We have one stall available for boarding (standard rate is $1,500/mo) at our top-tier facility, which features a covered round pen, a beautifully renovated arena with premium footing, and mud-free paddocks. We are happy to discount your horse's board in exchange for additional barn chores! Note on personal pets: We prefer no outside animals, but we are open to considering one well-behaved cat or small dog for the right candidate with impeccable references (tenant dogs must stay in the ADU or accompany you off-site). To Apply: Please reach out and tell us a bit about yourself, your experience with animals (horses or house pets!), and what makes you a great fit for our quiet property. (Keywords: Animal care, pet sitting, stable manager, barn manager, work trade, equestrian housing, country living, cottage, apartment)
